name: recoil_state_confirm_quit_static_init_thunks
description: RecoilStateConfirmQuit CRT static initialization helpers construct the global confirm-quit state, register its atexit destructor, and destroy it at process exit.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is accepted by the recoil_state_confirm_quit_destructors VC target.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x415820 validates loading ecx with g_RecoilState_ConfirmQuit and tail-jumping to RecoilStateConfirmQuit::Constructor.
Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x415840 validates loading ecx with g_RecoilState_ConfirmQuit and tail-jumping to RecoilStateConfirmQuit::~RecoilStateConfirmQuit.
Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x415830 validates atexit(RecoilStateConfirmQuit::AtExitDestructor), and 0x415810 validates StaticInit followed by a tail call to RegisterAtExit.

The native smoke verifies StaticInit constructs the global state, AtExitDestructor destroys the global active dialog path, and StaticInitAndRegisterAtExit leaves the global state constructed with no active dialog.
